message:
Enforce query_row strictness, cross-connection validation, and UNIQUE IGNORE rollback

query_row semantics (fsqlite-core/connection.rs):
- Rename first_row_or_error → exactly_one_row_or_error to enforce
  single-row invariant: now errors on BOTH zero rows and multiple rows
- Add QueryReturnedMultipleRows error variant (fsqlite-error/lib.rs)
  with error code, suggestion text, and recoverability classification
- Update compat layer doc comment and integration test for new semantics

Cross-connection prepared statement rejection (fsqlite-core/connection.rs):
- Detect when a PreparedStatement from one Connection is executed against
  a different Connection using std::ptr::eq on the inner DB pointer
- Return clear error instead of producing undefined behavior

UNIQUE IGNORE conflict rollback (fsqlite-vdbe/engine.rs):
- Introduce PendingInsertRollback struct tracking cursor_id, rowid, and
  previous_last_insert_rowid for proper undo on UNIQUE constraint violations
- When INSERT OR IGNORE hits a secondary unique constraint, properly undo
  the table insert, decrement change counter, and restore last_insert_rowid
- Add INSERT OR IGNORE test for secondary unique constraint conflicts

Minor cleanups:
- numeric_mod: use checked_rem(bi).unwrap_or_default() instead of verbose match
- value.rs: reorder slice/bytes conversion for clarity (trimmed.as_bytes()[..end])
- Remove unused Statement import from semantic_test_hack.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
